Coverage: 77.8% (126/162 lines)

Uncovered lines: 108, 110, 112-116, 130-134, 140-141, 146-149

Three untested paths in from_yaml_sources():
1. Definition override: when a later definition has the same name as an earlier one (lines 112-116) — the old entry should be replaced
2. Entity override: when a later entity has the same name (lines 133-134)
3. Invalid entity YAML: the warn-and-skip path (lines 140-141)
4. Debug log output at end (lines 146-149)

Test: provide duplicate names and malformed YAML to exercise these branches. #coverage-gap
Add tests for FieldsContext::from_yaml_sources override/error paths
